---
name: Decision record proposal
about: Surface an architectural question that needs a locked decision before code
title: "[decision] "
labels: needs-decision
---

## Context

The situation that surfaces the question. What is true today, what changed, what is making this come up now.

## The question

The specific question that needs to be locked. Phrase it so a yes/no or A/B/C answer is meaningful.

## Options considered

### Option A

What it is, what it costs, what it gains.

### Option B

What it is, what it costs, what it gains.

### Option C (if applicable)

What it is, what it costs, what it gains.

## Recommendation

Your read, with reasoning. If you do not have a clear read, say so.

## Affected epics / docs

Which epic specs, decision records, or conventions would change as a consequence of this decision.

## Cross-references

Links to prior art, related decisions, related epics.
